programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Temple Of Doom
programme.desc: Barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Matt Damon stars in this edge of your seat thriller as a rogue U.S. Army officer tasked with finding the weapons of mass destruction in the days immediately following the invasion of Iraq.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Two rivals reunite in Los Angeles when a crime brings them face to face again. Forced to work together against a shared enemy, they push their limits behind the wheel in a high-stakes chase for revenge.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin - a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

programme.title: Indiana Jones And The Last Crusade
programme.desc: In this third instalment of the great adventure saga, Indy is on a treacherous quest for the Holy Grail, complicated by a sexy woman with a fatal flaw: she's a Nazi agent.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a layabout party animal until he finds a seriously cool career - crime-fighting action hero. He teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take on LA's underworld.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A former hostage rescue commander and army veteran now works in skyscraper security. While based in Hong Kong, he is blamed for a fire in the world’s tallest tower and must clear his name.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Wealthy hunters pay for the right to stalk and kill the most challenging prey of them all: Man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: In this reunion of the fast and the furious, the speedsters are off to Brazil to attempt to defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all wiped out.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: In ancient China, a group of European mercenaries encounters a secret army that maintains and defends the Great Wall of China against a horde of monstrous creatures.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: White House Down

programme.desc: After trying hard to get his stepchildren to love him and call him Dad, Brad's plans turn upside down when the biological father, Dusty Mayron, returns.

programme.title: Planes, Trains And Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving, and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman, is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Left by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt had to raise himself. When he goes on a radio show and tells his story, it grabs the attention of the audience who try to help him find his family.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: A tough cop is given his most difficult assignment: masquerade as a kindergarten teacher in order to find a drug dealer.

programme.desc: Ricky Bobby stays atop the heap thanks to a pact with his best friend and teammate. But when a French Formula One driver makes his way up the ladder, Ricky Bobby's talents are put to the test.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three friends try to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity much to the ire of Pritchard, a dean at the college who was the target of their abuse when they were all students.

programme.title: The Boss

programme.desc: After a catastrophic crash, a pilot discovers he's stranded on Earth - 65 million years ago! With only one chance at rescue, he and the other survivor must cross a terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: The Book of Eli
programme.desc: In this post-apocalyptic tale, Denzel Washington stars as Eli, a man who is on a mission as he heads west along the Highway of Death. Eli has with him the last copy of a book that could revive society.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Matt Damon stars in this edge of your seat thriller as a rogue U.S. Army officer tasked with finding the weapons of mass destruction in the days immediately following the invasion of Iraq.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story: a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the organisation's most despised enemy - the Catholic Church.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: In ancient China, a group of European mercenaries encounters a secret army that maintains and defends the Great Wall of China against a horde of monstrous creatures.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Legendary monster hunter Van Helsing must rely on the help of the beautiful and mysterious Anna Valeris as he engages in an epic battle with the ultimate forces of darkness.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The G.I. Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra; they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: A young punk recruited by a car repossession agency finds himself in pursuit of a Chevrolet Malibu that is wanted for a $20,000 bounty and has something otherworldly stashed in its trunk.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-ton truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: After a cop is murdered by his partner, he ends up in the afterlife, where he joins a special police force protecting the living from souls that refuse to leave. He teams up with a former Old West sheriff to stop his partner from destroying the world.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: The wealthy live in luxury on a space station while the rest fight for scraps on a ruined Earth. Then one man is given an opportunity to even the score.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a Naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: Hunting a terrorist who has destroyed most of the fleet, the crew of the Enterprise must take a leap into unknown territory where loyalties will be tested and ultimate sacrifices made.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When two detectives are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the alluring and lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they’re left stranded on a raft, 160 km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Age Of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Jack Ryan, a retired CIA agent, is on vacation in England when he stops an assassination attempt on an important member of the Royal Family.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: Venom

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.desc: Horatio investigates the murder of a model intentionally run down outside of a Miami hotel by a driver who fled the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The body of a man involved in recovering sunken treasure is discovered pinned to the wall of his new cabin cruiser by a bloody spear fired from a spear gun at close range.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio hunts for the person responsible for a vicious attack on a woman who was lured to a vacant condo and beaten with a piece of lumber.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a teen tennis phenomenon is abducted from her bedroom, the investigation leads to the waterways when a girl's arm is recovered in the belly of a alligator.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The two young owners of a city bar are gunned down after hours and another man is wounded in the attack, which was allegedly committed by a masked gunman.

programme.title: The Angels' Share
programme.desc: Narrowly avoiding jail, new dad Robbie vows to turn over a new leaf. A visit to a whisky distillery inspires him and his mates to seek a way out of their hopeless lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A young beauty impulsively marries small-town doctor in order to leave her father's pig farm far behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: Sea Fever is a tense and original Irish sci-fi thriller reminiscent of cult classics "The Thing" and "The Abyss." For marine biology student Siobhán, it was supposed to be a research excursion with a trawler crew fishing the West Irish seas. Out in the deep Atlantic, an unfathomable life form ensnares the boat and they become marooned with a mysterious parasite infecting their water supply. Soon, the oozing force infiltrates the entire vessel and turns Siobhan's journey into a claustrophobic fight for survival. Can they stop the mysterious waterborne parasite from spreading before it's too late?

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: The first official feature documentary celebrating the incredible life of one of the most influential icons of the 20th Century, fashion designer Dame Mary Quant. Featuring contributions from Kate Moss, Vivienne Westwood, Edward Enninful, Dave Davies, Charlotte Tilbury, Jasper Conran and Zandra Rhodes as well as Mary’s family and peers.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Rosie
programme.desc: The story of a mother trying to protect her family after their landlord sells their rented home and they become homeless. Directed by Paddy Breathnach and stars Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad: Battle for Blood
programme.desc: It's 1216, just one year after the battle at Rochester Castle, and a new enemy threatens English - bands of Celtic raiders. After the death of his father at the hands of these raiders, Hubert is determined to defeat them, once and for all.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A young beauty impulsively marries small-town doctor in order to leave her father's pig farm far behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

Soon, the oozing force infiltrates the entire vessel and turns Siobhan's journey into a claustrophobic fight for survival. Can they stop the mysterious waterborne parasite from spreading before it's too late?

programme.title: Rosie
programme.desc: The story of a mother trying to protect her family after their landlord sells their rented home and they become homeless. Directed by Paddy Breathnach and stars Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Academy Award-nominee Bill Murray) and his wife Eleanor (Olivia Williams) host the King and Queen of England (Samuel West, Olivia Colman) for a weekend at their upstate New York vacation home. With Britain facing imminent war with Germany, the Windsors are desperately looking to FDR for support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as wife, mother and mistresses all conspire to make the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Also starring Academy Award-nominee Laura Linney.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: Suffused with mystery, and set against breath-taking landscapes, this bold and dramatic interpretation of the temptations of Christ explores Jesus’ confrontation with the devil in his last days fasting Judean desert. Finally contemplating a return to civilisation, and his imminent death, Jesus happens upon a troubled family dealing with a much more earthly problem: the young son being desperate to leave the familial home against his father’s wishes, in search of the big city.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are two girls who like to party - drink, drugs and general debauchery infuse their days while their careers and lives remain on hold. As they drift into their thirties, reality begins to bite, but Laura and Tyler will not be tamed so easily. When aspiring writer Laura (Holliday Grainger) meets the devilishly handsome musician Jim, sparks fly. As their relationship intensifies, Laura's friendship with Tyler (Alia Shawkat) comes under pressure; Tyler wants to keep the party going, living a life without limitation as Laura begins to settle into her relationship with Jim.

programme.title: AmStarDam
programme.desc: Combining classic fairytales with the wild world of Amsterdam, this riotous Lennox Brother's fantasy comedy is a coming of age story not for the faint hearted. Jack arrives in Amsterdam to find his father and through a momentary magical encounter, finds the secret weapon that could turn around his father's ailing marijuana coffee shop.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Based on the infamous 1941 true story, Whisky Galore! is a charming and heart-warming tale of a close-knit Scottish island community who mischievously relieve a sinking cargo ship of cases of whisky during wartime scarcity. The ensuing merriment is threatened when Excise Men try to spoil the party by catching the crafty locals, red handed, with the bottled loot. After enduring a ‘dry’ period, the shipwreck and its amber cargo was like mana from heaven to the islanders, to whom whisky was part of the very life blood of their Island!”
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man in the Hat
programme.desc: A man journeys through France in a Fiat 500, chased by five angry men. Always one step ahead of his pursuers, he encounters strangers, stories and songs in this musically inclined classic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: 'Fish Tank' is the story of Mia, a volatile 15-year-old who is always in trouble and who has become excluded from school and ostracized by her friends. On a hot summer’s day, her mother brings home a mysterious stranger named Connor who promises to change everything – and bring love into their lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: Suffused with mystery, and set against breath-taking landscapes, this bold and dramatic interpretation of the temptations of Christ explores Jesus’ confrontation with the devil in his last days fasting Judean desert. Finally contemplating a return to civilisation, and his imminent death, Jesus happens upon a troubled family dealing with a much more earthly problem: the young son being desperate to leave the familial home against his father’s wishes, in search of the big city.

programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy with Earl Cave as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum - Monica Dolan - in Simon Bird's debut feature.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Man in the Hat
programme.desc: A man journeys through France in a Fiat 500, chased by five angry men. Always one step ahead of his pursuers, he encounters strangers, stories and songs in this musically inclined classic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: Oranges and Sunshine tells the real-life story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham, who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals in recent times: the organised deportation of children in care from the United Kingdom to Australia. Almost single-handedly, against overwhelming odds and with little regard for her own well-being, Margaret reunited thousands of families.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Comes a Bright Day
programme.desc: Love blossoms in the most unusual circumstances when young bellboy Sam and beautiful shop assistant Mary (Imogen Poots, 28 Weeks Later) are kidnapped by brutal armed robbers (Kevin McKidd, Trainspotting; Josef Altin, Eastern Promises) intent on stealing a £1 million brooch. Taken hostage along with belligerent shop owner Charlie (Timothy Spall, The King’s Speech), the young couple find themselves falling for each other on this terrifying ‘first date’. This tense and stylish British thriller proves that sometimes extreme pressure can reveal a hidden gem.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Coriolanus is een Romeinse militair die niet kan aarden in de Romeinse samenleving. Coriolanus’ tirannieke moeder dwingt hem om de politiek in te gaan. Hij hengelt naar een zetel in de Senaat, maar moet daarvoor uiteraard in de genade van het volk komen. Omdat het publiek hem geen steun gunt, ontketent hij in z’n woede een rel die tot zijn verbanning van Rome leidt.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: Oranges and Sunshine tells the real-life story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham, who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals in recent times: the organised deportation of children in care from the United Kingdom to Australia. Almost single-handedly, against overwhelming odds and with little regard for her own well-being, Margaret reunited thousands of families.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: From the team behind Sexy Beast comes this potent exploration of the masculine ego at break point, set against the seedy back drop of London's gangster underbelly. Colin Diamond (Ray Winstone) is in agony. Shattered by the bombshell of his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity with a young French waiter. His motley crew of friends– Old Man Peanut (John Hurt), Meredith (Ian McShane), Archie (Tom Wilkinson), and Mal (Stephen Dillane) – kidnap Loverboy, and assemble a kangaroo court so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. Loverboy's life is now at stake as Colin wrestles with heartbreak, anger, madness, love andself pity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: AK47, a self-proclaimed 'art terrorist', details the story of a time when he set out to swipe a well-known piece of street artist Banksy's public art in central London.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: The first official feature documentary celebrating the incredible life of one of the most influential icons of the 20th Century, fashion designer Dame Mary Quant. Featuring contributions from Kate Moss, Vivienne Westwood, Edward Enninful, Dave Davies, Charlotte Tilbury, Jasper Conran and Zandra Rhodes as well as Mary’s family and peers.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up.

programme.title: Testament Of Youth
programme.desc: Testament of Youth is a powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War best selling memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman’s point of view. Staring Kit Harrington (Game of Thrones) and Alicia Vikander (Ex Machina). The film was produced by the legendary David Heyman (Harry Potter, Paddington and Gravity). The film follows a searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again, it’s a film about young love, the futility of war and how to make sense of the darkest times.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: The wife of a successful writer is asked by her husband to ghostwrite a story for him, but when her tale becomes a bestselling novel, she finds herself fighting for recognition in a world constrained by societal rules and gender roles.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: From acclaimed Director Peter Mullan comes NEDS, the story of a young man’s journey from prize winning schoolboy to knife carrying teenager. John McGill (an amazing performance from newcomer Conor McCarron) struggles with the low expectations of those around him and events take a maddening turn as he descends into shocking violence on a seemingly one man mission of self destruction.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Quant

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: I Am Slave reveals the shocking truth that if you're living in London today, you could be living next door to a slave. Having been kidnapped as a child and taken away from the Nuba Mountains in Sudan, young Malia finds herself being sent to London as a teenager, and made to work with no wages and no freedom in a house where they control her every move.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Rubika Shah’s energising film charts a vital national protest movement. Rock Against Racism (RAR) was formed in 1976, prompted by ‘music’s biggest colonialist’ Eric Clapton and his support of racist MP Enoch Powell. White Riot blends fresh interviews with queasy archive footage to recreate a hostile environment of anti-immigrant hysteria and National Front marches. As neo-Nazis recruited the nation’s youth, RAR’s multicultural punk and reggae gigs provided rallying points for resistance. As founder Red Saunders explains: ‘We peeled away the Union Jack to reveal the swastika’. The campaign grew from Hoxton fanzine roots to 1978’s huge antifascist carnival in Victoria Park, featuring X-Ray Spex, Steel Pulse and of course The Clash, whose rock star charisma and gale-force conviction took RAR’s message to the masses.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Instead of wanting to be like her older sister, who is preparing to be a traditional Indian wife, young Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero David Beckham! Eventually, her family must decide whether or not to let Jess chase her dream – and a soccer ball – in this insightful romantic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: 'Fish Tank' is the story of Mia, a volatile 15-year-old who is always in trouble and who has become excluded from school and ostracized by her friends. On a hot summer’s day, her mother brings home a mysterious stranger named Connor who promises to change everything – and bring love into their lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Two miles west of London, Dr. Robert Laing moves into his new apartment seeking soulless anonymity, only to find that the building's residents have no intention of leaving him alone. Resigned to the complex social dynamics unfolding around him, Laing bites the bullet and becomes neighbourly. As he struggles to establish his position, Laing's good manners and sanity.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: I Am Slave reveals the shocking truth that if you're living in London today, you could be living next door to a slave. Having been kidnapped as a child and taken away from the Nuba Mountains in Sudan, young Malia finds herself being sent to London as a teenager, and made to work with no wages and no freedom in a house where they control her every move.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
